permits.description: Replace roof of house, replace gutters and replace rotted exterior trim throughout house
Complete installation of a 3 zone hydro air system, incorporating some existing ductwork
permits.contractor: Village Services Corporation DBA Village Home Services

permits.description: Excavate for new foundation for finished basement. New HVAC in basement. New bedroom, bathroom and laundry in basement. New windows in basement to code. Smoke/CO to code. New front porch per plans
permits.score_reasons: keyword: foundation; minor: shed; permit completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: Significant expansion of living space via a finished basement (adding a bedroom, bathroom, and laundry) and a new porch, combined with total roof and HVAC updates by a long-term owner-occupant, indicates a major value-add effort often associated with preparing a home for market.
